text: Oak Island Fishing Pier: Spanish mackerel and bluefish working the pilings, best at first light on Gotcha plugs and cut bait.
Live shrimp and finger mullet holding up well in Lockwood Folly Inlet — flounder and puppy drum mixed in on the last two tides.
Whiting and pompano biting in the surf near the 40th St. beach access; sand fleas outproducing shrimp this week.
Reminder: red drum slot limit is 18–27 inches, one fish per person per day, statewide in NC coastal waters.
